verdicts.rationale: Matches analysis ruleId=tech:noindex-conflict exactly (count=3, pctOfPages=30, cluster /leistungen/* count=3, all three affectedUrls quoted verbatim); the intent caveat in auswirkung is framed conditionally, not asserted as fact.
Matches analysis ruleId=tech:sitemap-quality exactly (count=3, pctOfPages=30, cluster /fehler/* count=3, all three affectedUrls quoted verbatim); no numbers beyond the analysis.

Matches analysis ruleId=tech:robots-sitemap-conflict exactly (count=2, pctOfPages=20, cluster /gesperrt/* count=2, both affectedUrls quoted verbatim) and correctly cites signals.robots.disallow=["/gesperrt/"] as confirmation.

Matches analysis ruleId=tech:canonical-nonself exactly (count=4, pctOfPages=40, cluster /produkte/* count=4, all four affectedUrls quoted verbatim); the possible-intent caveat is hedged with "könnten", not stated as fact.

Matches analysis ruleId=tech:redirect-chain exactly (count=2, pctOfPages=20, cluster /alt/* count=2, both affectedUrls quoted verbatim); honestly notes the exact hop chain isn't in analysis.json rather than inventing one.
Matches analysis ruleId=crawl:orphan-page exactly (count=1, affectedUrls=[/verwaist/altseite]); the derived "1 von 10" (=10%) equals the analysis's own pctOfPages=10, not an invented figure.
